title: After BrowseComp was brushed to 90%, Meituan LongCat launched LoHoSearch: Frontline models collectively dropped back to less than 30%
excerpt: The strength of search agents has been largely determined by BrowseComp over the past year. However, this benchmark is losing its effectiveness — it pushed mode
content_html:
The strength of search agents has been largely determined by BrowseComp over the past year. However, this benchmark is losing its effectiveness — it pushed model performance from 30% to 90% in just 10 months, and the significance of the benchmark itself is rapidly being surpassed. On July 17, Meituan's LongCat introduced a tougher test called LoHoSearch, aiming to push search agents back into a phase of improvement.

LoHoSearch's challenges are not created by humans but are instead automatically generated from a knowledge graph of 7.62 million entities on Wikipedia. Due to their machine-generated origin, they reach difficulty levels that human annotators could never consistently design in terms of search space and structural complexity. In other words, previous benchmarks were designed by human brains, and even the hardest questions had a ceiling; LoHoSearch hands over the question-creation authority to the knowledge graph, completely removing the difficulty ceiling.

The results are striking. In tests with 11 cutting-edge models, the best score was only 34.74%, while the next three models scored around 15% to 16%. Meanwhile, the same top models currently achieve about 90% on BrowseComp. The gap clearly shows that LoHoSearch has exposed the true weaknesses of search agents. Even more interestingly, the marginal utility of context strategies: the best context strategy on LoHoSearch only brought a 6.8 percentage point improvement, while the same operation achieved 14 percentage points on BrowseComp — meaning that the old approach of compensating for ability gaps through prompts and context engineering is almost ineffective in this new benchmark.

This benchmark itself contains 544 questions covering 11 fields, organized in tree-like and graph structures, and has already been open-sourced. When the old benchmark reaches its peak, the real challenges for search agents have just begun, and LoHoSearch may become an unavoidable test item next.

sentences.zh: 过去一年里，搜索代理的实力在很大程度上是由 BrowseComp 决定的。

sentences.en: However, this benchmark is losing its effectiveness — it pushed model performance from 30% to 90% in just 10 months, and the significance of the benchmark itself is rapidly being surpassed.
sentences.zh: 然而，这个基准测试正在失去有效性——它在短短 10 个月内将模型性能从 30% 提升到了 90%，而基准测试本身的重要性正在迅速被超越。

sentences.en: On July 17, Meituan's LongCat introduced a tougher test called LoHoSearch, aiming to push search agents back into a phase of improvement.
sentences.zh: 7月17日，美团龙猫推出了更为严格的测试，名为LoHoSearch，旨在推动搜索代理重新进入改进阶段。

sentences.en: In tests with 11 cutting-edge models, the best score was only 34.74%, while the next three models scored around 15% to 16%.
sentences.zh: 在11款前沿机型的测试中，最好成绩仅为34.74%，而接下来的三款机型得分在15%到16%左右。

sentences.en: Meanwhile, the same top models currently achieve about 90% on BrowseComp.
sentences.zh: 与此同时，同样的顶级型号目前在 BrowseComp 上达到了 90% 左右。

sentences.en: The gap clearly shows that LoHoSearch has exposed the true weaknesses of search agents.
sentences.zh: 这一差距清楚地表明 LoHoSearch 暴露了搜索代理的真正弱点。

sentences.en: Even more interestingly, the marginal utility of context strategies: the best context strategy on LoHoSearch only brought a 6.8 percentage point improvement, while the same operation achieved 14 percentage points on BrowseComp — meaning that the old approach of compensating for ability gaps through prompts and context engineering is almost ineffective in this new benchmark.
sentences.zh: 更有趣的是，上下文策略的边际效用：LoHoSearch 上的最佳上下文策略仅带来了 6.8 个百分点的提升，而相同的操作在 BrowseComp 上实现了 14 个百分点——这意味着通过提示和上下文工程来补偿能力差距的旧方法在这个新基准中几乎无效。

blocks.html_en: This benchmark itself contains 544 questions covering 11 fields, organized in tree-like and graph structures, and has already been open-sourced. When the old benchmark reaches its peak, the real challenges for search agents have just begun, and LoHoSearch may become an unavoidable test item next.

sentences.en: This benchmark itself contains 544 questions covering 11 fields, organized in tree-like and graph structures, and has already been open-sourced.
sentences.zh: 该基准本身包含涵盖 11 个领域的 544 个问题，以树状和图形结构组织，并且已经开源。

sentences.en: When the old benchmark reaches its peak, the real challenges for search agents have just begun, and LoHoSearch may become an unavoidable test item next.
sentences.zh: 当旧的基准达到顶峰时，搜索代理真正的挑战才刚刚开始，LoHoSearch可能成为接下来不可避免的测试项目。

content_html_zh:
过去一年里，搜索代理的实力在很大程度上是由 BrowseComp 决定的。 然而，这个基准测试正在失去有效性——它在短短 10 个月内将模型性能从 30% 提升到了 90%，而基准测试本身的重要性正在迅速被超越。 7月17日，美团龙猫推出了更为严格的测试，名为LoHoSearch，旨在推动搜索代理重新进入改进阶段。

LoHoSearch 的挑战不是由人类创建的，而是根据维基百科上 762 万个实体的知识图自动生成的。 由于它们是机器生成的，它们达到了人类注释者在搜索空间和结构复杂性方面永远无法一致设计的难度水平。 换句话说，以前的基准都是由人脑设计的，即使是最难的问题也有上限； LoHoSearch将出题权交给了知识图谱，彻底消除了难度上限。

结果是惊人的。 在11款前沿机型的测试中，最好成绩仅为34.74%，而接下来的三款机型得分在15%到16%左右。 与此同时，同样的顶级型号目前在 BrowseComp 上达到了 90% 左右。 这一差距清楚地表明 LoHoSearch 暴露了搜索代理的真正弱点。 更有趣的是，上下文策略的边际效用：LoHoSearch 上的最佳上下文策略仅带来了 6.8 个百分点的提升，而相同的操作在 BrowseComp 上实现了 14 个百分点——这意味着通过提示和上下文工程来补偿能力差距的旧方法在这个新基准中几乎无效。

该基准本身包含涵盖 11 个领域的 544 个问题，以树状和图形结构组织，并且已经开源。 当旧的基准达到顶峰时，搜索代理真正的挑战才刚刚开始，LoHoSearch可能成为接下来不可避免的测试项目。
